title: Turkish-Style Cornmeal Fritters
description: A crispy and savory fritter made with cornmeal and spices, inspired by traditional Turkish cuisine.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together the cornmeal, pilaf, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg and bitter.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a thick batter forms.
4. Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Using a spoon, drop the batter into the oil and flatten slightly.
6. Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
7. Remove the fritters from the oil and drain on paper towels.
